semantic.role: CLI command adapter for the `info` subcommand, orchestrating sync status display and optional detailed reports by delegating to engine and service modules.
responsibilities: Execute the `info` CLI command by parsing arguments and delegating to `runInfoReport` or `runUsageReport` based on flags.
Retrieve and display project sync status from the runtime service (`runtimeService.getSyncStatusService().status`).
Translate errors into user-facing messages using `toArchSpineError` from the core error system.
Pass `defaultRuntimeIO` as the I/O abstraction to engine functions for consistent output.
outOfScope: Direct AST extraction, scanning, or file system traversal.
Pipeline orchestration beyond calling predefined engine functions.
LLM provider selection or credential management.
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter: it must not absorb logic that belongs in services, core, engines, or infra (enforced by rule `cli-entrypoint-separation`).
All I/O flows through `defaultRuntimeIO` to enable testability.
Command behavior must be solely determined by CLI arguments and the delegated modules; no hidden side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a clear separation where CLI modules act as entrypoint adapters, delegating all domain and infrastructure logic to layers below.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored to remove legacy CLI aliases and improve command structure, with related documentation and schema updates.

publicSurface.description: Configuration interface for the info command execution, containing CLI arguments, root directory, and an optional RuntimeService instance.
Asynchronously executes the info command: displays sync status and, based on CLI flags, runs the detailed information report or usage report by delegating to engine modules.
